_metadata.note: Medicaid uses MAGI-based income, measured against HHS poverty guidelines published each January. CY2026 Medicaid income limits use the 2026 HHS poverty guidelines (published January 2026). Unlike SNAP/WIC, Medicaid follows the calendar year, not the federal fiscal year.
_metadata.source: KFF State Health Facts — Medicaid Income Eligibility Limits (2026)
_metadata.verification_note: Verify expansion status and non-expansion limits against CMS and KFF 2026 state data.

notes: Medicaid uses MAGI (Modified Adjusted Gross Income), NOT the same calculation as SNAP net income.
Expansion states cover adults up to 138% FPL under ACA Medicaid expansion.
Non-expansion states have coverage gaps for adults without dependent children.
Children and pregnant women have higher income limits in all states.
AR and OK have alternative/private-option expansion models.
CY2026 uses the 2026 HHS poverty guidelines published January 2026.
VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Confirm expansion status and limits against CMS data for 2026.
